keyFactors: If no candidates from a school had been hired in a while I would go to that school and give them an opportunity, A few of the schools seemed to want to better their reputation and I think if the experiment had gone on longer would have trained them to be successful candidates.
strategy: I looked at the win/fail ratio for each school
motivation: I liked that it felt like I was playing with real humans. Many surveys say you are playing with humans but they are really bots and it's east to tell. On this survery I think they may have really been people.
additionalFeedback: Thanks for the chance. Please include me in any future surveys.

strategy: Once I saw what was the obvious leader I went with that.
I hired from schools that had the best success vs failure rate
